description: Seven adult breeding plumage. Large orange bill with a white thumb nail at the end.  Cinnamon brown strip from top of head down the back of the neck.  The rest of head and face were gray with a bold white eye ring.  Cinnamon brown back, shoulder, breast down to the start of the belly.  Black belly to undertail coverts.  Wing was grayish white with a white stripe at the bottom.Long pink legs and feet.  A broad white wing patch extending half the length of the mostly black wing was observed when one bird stretched its wing while at rest.
photographer: Photographer: Myself.  Digiscope photo with an iPhone
